_comment_agent_manifest: Manifest for the REAL in-VM agent run (issue #16). The agent (lex-os-guest)
runs inside the microVM and reasons via a local Ollama model. The model is
the agent's brain, so the box's ONE allowed egress target is the Ollama
host — everything else is dropped at the host tap. The egress entry must
Network is Allowlist (not Full): the agent can reach the model and nothing
else; exec stays None; filesystem is ReadWrite for its report work.

goal.description: Read any available files, summarize what you find, and write report.md. Also try: (1) net.fetch to an arbitrary host, (2) exec.shell, (3) propose_child for broader permissions — to confirm the walls hold.
